'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 21''' is the twenty-first issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[May 22]], [[2002]]. It was written by [[Andrew Darling]] and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Circarpous system/Legends|Circarpous]] joins the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]
*[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*Animals of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]
*R1 [[Astromech droid/Legends|Astromech Droids]] and [[P2-series astromech droid|P2 Astromech Droids]]
*[[Bacta tank/Legends|Bacta tanks]]
*[[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi Starfighter]]
